hero.tagline:
Two orchestras. Three nights. One stadium.
The Asian tango lineup that doesn't exist anywhere else.

orchestras.eyebrow: ★ TWO LIVE ORCHESTRAS ★ · From Buenos Aires
orchestras.title: Two orchestras from Buenos Aires
orchestras.lede: Two world-touring orchestras from Buenos Aires. Playing live in Chuncheon.

items.name: Tango Bardo
items.description: A Buenos Aires quintet with tours across Asia, Europe, and Oceania. Raw, powerful — built for the dance floor.

items.name: Misteriosa Buenos Aires
items.description: Founded 2008. Eight European tours. Nine musicians. The full weight of a proper Buenos Aires orchestra.

theNights.title: Three nights, going deeper.
theNights.lede: What 2025 showed — the energy of the stage, a full floor, all the way to the last tanda.

schedule.title: Three days, full program.
schedule.lede: From the opening concert to the milongas, to the city tour.

items.mood: The deepest dive of the three nights.

items.mood: Walking through the lakeside city's autumn.

about.title: Chuncheon International Tango Festival
about.body: KCCTF is a three-day festival combining live orchestra concerts with social dance (milongas). Two orchestras flown directly from Buenos Aires, six DJs from Korea, China, and Hong Kong — three nights of tango together. A meeting place for the global tango community in Chuncheon's autumn.

items.label: Supported by
items.value: Chuncheon City · Embassy of Argentina in Korea

items.a: Click the Register button to be taken to the application page. Reservation is confirmed upon payment within 3 days of submission.
Please see the Refund Policy page. Partial refund available up to 30 days before the festival; refunds become difficult thereafter.
Shinhan Bank, account 100-038-582544 (holder: Chuncheon International Tango Festival Foundation).

items.q: Can I pay with a foreign credit card?
items.a: Currently we operate primarily with bank transfers. For foreign card payments, please contact info@kcctf.org for separate guidance.

items.q: How do I get to Chuncheon?
items.a: About 60 minutes from Seoul by ITX-Cheongchun or KTX, or about 80 minutes by intercity bus. From Incheon Airport, around 2-3 hours via airport bus or ITX transfer.
The most convenient option is the official hotel (The Venezia Suite) booked through our Full Pack + 2/3 nights packages. You may also book other accommodations independently.
Workshop availability will be announced soon.
On-site registration is possible but may be limited if capacity is reached. Advance reservation is strongly recommended.

items.q: I want to dance more in Korea, before or after the festival.
items.a: All milongas, events, and classes across Korea are listed on TangoNOW — the most comprehensive guide to the Korean tango scene.

cityGuide.title: Three Days Off the Floor
cityGuide.lede: A short guide to the city. Recommendations coming soon.

afterKcctf.title: More tango in Korea
afterKcctf.lede: Staying in Korea before or after the festival? Keep dancing in other cities.
afterKcctf.ledeEn: 한국에 더 머무신다면, 다른 도시에서 계속 추세요.
